creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 198930
svn diff for www/spdylay

Hi,

www/spdylay doesn't seem to be broken with OpenSSL 1.1 as of version 1.4

Just built succesfully locally. You're probably not getting pkg-fallout messages for 12 and head for this port, another good indication that this builds OK with OpenSSL 1.1.

On another note: NPN has been superseeded by ALPN, do we still need this in ports?

Cheers, Bernard
